xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Manufacture of the substance
xone_alternatives.has_value: Manufacture of the substance

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC1

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Formulation into mixture
xone_alternatives.has_value: Formulation into mixture

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC2

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to uses in all types of formulating industries; substance is mixed (blended) into (chemical) mixtures Examples: formulation of paints, household cleaners, lubricants, fuels, bulk chemicals for industrial uses etc.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Formulation into solid matrix
xone_alternatives.has_value: Formulation into solid matrix

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC3

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to uses in formulating industries; substance is mixed (blended) in order to be physically or chemically bound into or onto a solid matrix Example: formulation of stabilisers into master-batches for production of polymer pellets

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Use of non-reactive processing aid at industrial site (no inclusion into or onto article)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Use of non-reactive processing aid at industrial site (no inclusion into or onto article)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC4

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Examples: Chemical processing where the substance is used as solvent for crystallisation; Production activities where the substance is used as a cleaning agent (solvent or surfactant); Polymer moulding/casting where the substance is used as anti-set off agent

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Use at industrial site leading to inclusion into/onto article
xone_alternatives.has_value: Use at industrial site leading to inclusion into/onto article

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC5

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: The substance or its transformation products are included into or onto article Examples: Use of binding agent and process regulators in paints and coatings or adhesives; Use of dyes in textile fabrics and leather products; Use of metals in coatings applied through plating; and galvanizing processes Use of plasticisers, pigments or flame retardants in article matrix or coatings on articles. Covers also uses where the substance remains in the article after having previously been used as processing aid (e.g. heat stabilisers in plastic processing).

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Use of intermediate
xone_alternatives.has_value: Use of intermediate

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC6a

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: The substance is used in order to manufacture another substance Examples: Use of chemical building blocks (feedstock) in the synthesis of agrochemicals, pharmaceuticals etc.; Use of cyclopentanone in the synthesis of cyclopentanol

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Use of reactive processing aid at industrial site (no inclusion into or onto article)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Use of reactive processing aid at industrial site (no inclusion into or onto article)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC6b

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: The substance or its transformation product(s) are not included into or onto article; substance reacts on use Examples: Use of bleaching agents in textile and paper industry; Use of catalysts

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Use of monomer in polymerisation processes at industrial site (inclusion or not into/onto article)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Use of monomer in polymerisation processes at industrial site (inclusion or not into/onto article)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC6c

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: The substance is used as monomer in the production of polymers (resins, plastics (thermoplastics)) Examples: Use of vinyl chloride monomer in the production of PVC. Use of monomers in production of resins

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Use of reactive process regulators in polymerisation processes at industrial site (inclusion or not into/onto article)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Use of reactive process regulators in polymerisation processes at industrial site (inclusion or not into/onto article)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC6d

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: The substance is used as process regulator (e.g. cross- linking agents, curing agents) for polymerisation process – production of resins, thermosets, rubbers, polymers Examples: Use of styrene in polyester production; Use of vulcanization agents in the production of rubbers; Use of catalysts

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Use of functional fluid at industrial site
xone_alternatives.has_value: Use of functional fluid at industrial site

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC7

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: The substance is used as functional fluid and does not get in contact with products; substance is contained during the use. Examples: Use of engine and machine oils; Use of fluids in hydraulic systems and heat transfer systems; Does not cover the case where a substance/mixture is an integral part of an article (e.g. batteries) Does not cover uses where: 1. substances are used as processing aids or reactants in chemical processes (see ERC 6a to 6d); 2. articles are treated with processing aids (e.g. metal part cleaning or textile cleaning) (see ERC 4)

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Widespread use of non- reactive processing aid (no inclusion into or onto article, indoor)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Widespread use of non- reactive processing aid (no inclusion into or onto article, indoor)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC8a

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to uses by the public at large or by professional workers Use (usually) results in release into air or the sewage system Examples: Down the drain product like e.g. Use of detergents in fabric washing, use of machine wash liquids and lavatory cleaners, use of automotive and bicycle care products (polishes, lubricants, de-icers); Use of solvents in paints and adhesives; Use of fragrances and aerosol propellants in air fresheners.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Widespread use of reactive processing aid (no inclusion into or onto article, indoor)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Widespread use of reactive processing aid (no inclusion into or onto article, indoor)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC8b

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to uses by the public at large or by professional workers Example: Use of sodium hypochlorite in lavatory cleaners, bleaching agents in fabric washing products, hydrogen peroxide in dental care products.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Widespread use leading to inclusion into/onto article (indoor)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Widespread use leading to inclusion into/onto article (indoor)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC8c

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to uses by the public at large or by professional workers; substance or its transformation products will be physically or chemically bound into or onto article Examples: Use of binding agent or process regulators in paints and coatings or adhesives; Use of dyes during dyeing of textile fabrics

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Widespread use of non- reactive processing aid (no inclusion into or onto article, outdoor)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Widespread use of non- reactive processing aid (no inclusion into or onto article, outdoor)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC8d

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to uses by the public at large or by professional workers Examples: Use of automotive and bicycle care products (polishes, greases de-icers, detergents), use of highly volatile solvents in paints and adhesives

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Widespread use of reactive processing aid (no inclusion into or onto article, outdoor)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Widespread use of reactive processing aid (no inclusion into or onto article, outdoor)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC8e

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to uses by the public at large or by professional workers Example: use of sodium hypochlorite or hydrogen peroxide for surface cleaning (building materials)

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Widespread use leading to inclusion into/onto article (outdoor)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Widespread use leading to inclusion into/onto article (outdoor)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC8f

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to uses by the public at large or by professional workers; substance or its transformation products will be physically or chemically bound into or onto article Example: Use of binding agent or process regulators in paints and coatings or adhesives during application

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Widespread use of functional fluid (indoor)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Widespread use of functional fluid (indoor)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC9a

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to uses by the public at large or by professional workers; substance is used as functional fluid and does not get in contact with products; substance is contained during the use Example: Use of substance in oil-based electric heaters. Does not cover the case where a substance/mixture is an integral part of an article (e.g. batteries)

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Widespread use of functional fluid (outdoor)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Widespread use of functional fluid (outdoor)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC9b

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to uses by the public at large or by professional workers; substance is used as functional fluid and does not get in contact with products; substance is contained during the use Examples: Motor oils; Break fluids in automotive brake systems; Fluids/gases is air conditioning systems. Does not cover the case where a substance/mixture is an integral part of an article (e.g. batteries)

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Widespread use of articles with low release (outdoor)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Widespread use of articles with low release (outdoor)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC10a

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to the use of articles by the public at large or by professional workers where there is no intended release of the registered substance and where the conditions of use do not promote releases. Example: Service life of metal, wooden and plastic construction and building materials (gutters, drains, frames, etc.); Automotive batteries

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Widespread use of articles with high or intended release (outdoor)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Widespread use of articles with high or intended release (outdoor)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC10b

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to the use of articles by the public at large or by professional workers where the registered substance is intended to be released or where the conditions of use promote releases. Also applies to processing by the public at large or by professional workers where the substances included into or onto articles are released (intended or not) from/with the article matrix as a result of processing. Examples: Service life of tyres and brake pads in trucks or cars; Substances released from articles during work at elevated temperature

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Widespread use of articles with low release (indoor)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Widespread use of articles with low release (indoor)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC11a

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to the use of articles by the public at large or by professional workers where there is no intended release of the registered substance and where the conditions of use do not promote releases Examples: Non-volatile substances in flooring, furniture, toys, construction materials, curtains, footwear, leather products, paper and cardboard products (magazines, books, news paper and packaging paper), electronic equipment (casing)

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Widespread use of articles with high or intended release (indoor)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Widespread use of articles with high or intended release (indoor)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC11b

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to the use of articles by the public at large or by professional workers where the registered substance is intended to be released or where the conditions of use promote releases. Also applies to processing by the public at large or by professional workers where the substances included into or onto articles are released (intended or not) from/with the article matrix as a result of processing. Examples: Substances released from fabrics, textiles (clothing, floor rugs) during washing; Fragrance in scented articles (toys, papers, sanitary towels, …)

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Processing of articles at industrial sites with low release
xone_alternatives.has_value: Processing of articles at industrial sites with low release

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC12a

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to uses at industrial sites where the substances included into or onto articles are released (intended or not) from/with the article matrix as a result of processing by workers; release remains low Examples: Cutting of textile, cutting, machining or grinding of metal or polymers in engineering industries

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Processing of articles at industrial sites with high release
xone_alternatives.has_value: Processing of articles at industrial sites with high release

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC12b

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to uses at industrial sites where the substances included into or onto articles are released (intended or not) from/with the article matrix as a result of processing by workers; release is high Examples: Substances released from articles during sanding operations or paint stripping by shot-blasting (high amounts of dust expected); Substances released from articles during processes at elevated temperature

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Use of articles at industrial sites with low release
xone_alternatives.has_value: Use of articles at industrial sites with low release

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: ERC12c

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Applies to uses of articles at industrial sites where the substances included into or onto articles are not intended to be released and where the conditions of use do not promote release. Examples: Machinery at industrial sites. Note: where an article is used at industrial sites but also in the same conditions by professional workers or consumers (e.g. pens, plates, mobile phones) there is no need to report that use with an ERC12c. That use can be reported with the ERC categories corresponding to widespread use of articles.
